title: Usyk vs. Rico: Glory in Giza

posts.body: The official Tapology discussion thread for the event!

posts.author: KHAMZAT_MAKHACHEV
posts.body: Predictions: 1 of 8 Pending | Tied for 1st with 403 others Usyk vs. VerhoevenOleksandr Usyk, TKO, R1Rico Verhoeven was never a good fighter in any aspect of martial arts—kickboxing included. Usyk will put him out in under one minute 🇷🇺

posts.author: cashmoneycash
posts.body: Predictions: 1 of 8 Pending | Tied for 1st with 403 others Wish i could side with the kickboxer, It's a shame Rico has no path to victory in this fight at all. No knockout power his boxing is mediocre he can't set anything up without using his kicks. Even his last fight was lackluster man.

posts.author: novaCMMA
posts.body: Predictions: 6 of 8 Pending | Tied for 1st with 403 others Uysk by stoppage i'd say round 4. Rico is competent but Uysk will hurt him bad.

posts.author: D1D4K10
posts.body: Predictions: 1 of 8 Pending | Tied for 1st with 403 others Rico has cardio for 5 round fights. Idk how his pace will improve because kickboxers go all out during 3/5 rounds. Doing 12 is on a whole new level for Rico, this fight won’t go the distance.His power isn’t amazing as well, in 66 fights he has 21 KOs, and in 29 GLORY fights he has a 14:5 knockdown ratio.As we all know how Usyk fights, my initial prediction is Usyk by R6 KO/TKO. It will balance between 4-7 imo

posts.body: Predictions: 8 of 8 Pending | Tied for 1st with 403 others People are ****ting on this fight but honestly I think it’s fun, hopefully though guys like Wardley and Kabayel can get the shots they deserve.

posts.author: IlikeMMAandboobs
posts.body: Usyk vs. VerhoevenOleksandr Usyk, TKO, R4This will probably be a massacre for Rico. He's a kickboxer who will fight in a boxing match against the strongest HW boxer of today (Maybe of all time?). It would've been better for him to accept the UFC deal instead of this: he would have probably become the UFC HW champion, since the division sucks right now.Free CTE for Rico
